originalAlarm.description: accessing `__hdr_10` that was invalidated by call to `free()` on line 166.

sanitizedDescription: accessing `hdr` that was invalidated by call to `free()` on line 166.
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_MODULE_UNLOAD () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SMP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: USE_AFTER_FREE at 6e2b75740be.c L67: hdr is freed at ~L66 then accessed at L67. Bug occurs in the !MODULE_UNLOAD OR !SMP path. No // ERROR at L67 (known bug at L63 is different), so this is a new bug. PC = (!MODULE_UNLOAD) OR (MODULE_UNLOAD AND !SMP) correctly covers the complementary path to the known bug.
